summary.lv: Citadele Lending IT Solutions Delivery Department meklē QA inženieri (manuāla un automatizēta testēšana), kas izstrādās regresijas testus, testēs banku/kredītu produktus LV/LT/EE tirgos un izmantos MI rīkus testu automatizācijā.
summary.en: Citadele's Lending IT Solutions Delivery Department is hiring a QA Engineer (manual + automation) to build regression tests, test banking/credit products across the LV/LT/EE markets, and apply AI tooling to test automation.
